name: Oh My Grill
tagline: Aiea's go-to for late-night local comfort food — loco moco, garlic shrimp plates, and mixed plates until midnight.
mustOrder: loco moco — the 11pm standard, gravy-drenched and satisfying
garlic shrimp plate — solid execution of a North Shore classic
mixed plate — pick two proteins, rice, mac salad, done
parking: Shopping center lot on Kamehameha Hwy
talkStory: When it's 11pm in Aiea and you need real food — not fast food, not convenience store — Oh My Grill is where you end up. Open 9am to midnight daily, it fills the late-night gap that most local restaurants leave wide open. The menu is classic local comfort: plate lunches, loco moco, burgers, garlic shrimp, and katsu. Nothing fancy, nothing trying to be — just consistent local grinds at hours when everything else is closed. Pearl City and Aiea locals have adopted this as their default late-night spot.
